title: Resolute 16x
description: Resolute 16x is a clean and FPS-friendly PvP texture pack by Skeptal, built for Minecraft 1.8.9. With sharp visuals, simplified textures, and multiple color variants. Betterr than  Dull Vanilla texture
body:
**Resolute 16x is a lightweight PvP-focused texture pack created by Skeptal, designed for players who want smooth performance without sacrificing style. Built on a 16×16 p, it delivers sharp visuals, simplified textures, and clear item designs to help you focus during fast-paced gameplay**.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8fh6gZdAWPk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Key Features**:
Optimized for Minecraft 1.8.9 PvP
Clean and minimal visuals for better clarity
Full support for blocks, items, GUI, and particle
FPS-friendly, perfect for both low-end and high-end PCs
